reasoning: The Polymarket price on December 25, 2025, was 83%. Recent ISW and Critical Threats reports from late December 2025 and early January 2026 confirm that Russian forces have entered Kostyantynivka, with confirmed geolocated advances into the southern part of the city along the H-20/T-0516 highway, and ongoing intense fighting "near and within" the city itself. Furthermore, Russian commanders and Putin claimed on December 23 to hold "more than half" of Kostyantynivka. Although ISW characterized these specific claims as inflated, the confirmed presence of Russian forces inside the city, combined with their numerical superiority in artillery and robust glide bomb support, indicates a strong momentum. Given the three-month timeframe until March 31, 2026, it is highly probable (matching the 83% market consensus) that Russian forces will capture the Kostyantynivka railroad station, which lies within the city limits. No major Ukrainian counter-offensive has fundamentally reversed these specific urban gains in the days following the December 25 market price.
